prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 020
Filename: 020_radiant_joy.png
Purpose: The biggest authentic smile we have ever seen from Chloe.
Success Criteria: Joyful rather than glamorous. The audience should feel relieved that Chloe can still experience happiness.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Emotion is open and radiant while remaining unmistakably Chloe.
Review Focus: Reject if the image becomes glamour, commercial beauty, childlike, overly polished, or identity-drifting.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical radiant joy reference. Chloe remains recognizable while showing her largest authentic smile.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
